svg.text: One-pager. Magazine sensibility: cover, featured case, byline grid, typographic client list. Desktop + mobile, side by side.
Belinda Lanks is an editor, content strategist, and writer in
Brooklyn — shaping editorial systems for design-forward brands
and writing about culture, design, and the lives we build inside.
After Geneviève Claisse, Petit Grumeau — placeholder for original artwork.
s editor-in-chief at Razorfish, I led the editorial
vision for Explore — a branded magazine designed to
help readers elevate their passions with tech, not be sold to
by it. Won industry recognition; became a model for what
brand journalism can be when the words come first.
Reads like an issue cover, not
